mission.title: atlantis: Terraform log streaming for custom workflows
mission.description: Terraform log streaming for custom workflows. Requested by 38+ users.

steps.title: Check current atlantis deployment
steps.description:
Verify your atlantis version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
helm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working atlantis installation.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
#1937 introduced log streaming of TF commands. The PR states that custom workflows were considered out of scope.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Terraform log streaming for custom workflows
steps.description:
This feature allows users to view their terraform logs in real time when running atlantis plan/apply commands.  This implementation uses websockets to stream the logs from the terraform client to the user's web browser. 

### How to use it? 

- Comment atlantis plan/apply command on any PR as usual. 
- The github status checks will update with links to the log-streaming UI for every workspace for every project in the PR. If a workspace is not set, it defaults to a default workspace. 
- Click on

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Terraform log streaming for custom workflows" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This feature allows users to view their terraform logs in real time when running atlantis plan/apply commands.  This implementation uses websockets to stream the logs from the terraform client to the user's web browser. 

### How to use it? 

- Comment atlantis plan/apply command on any PR as usual.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
